subject: WS1.3 Betty condition absorbed; focused gates green, repo-wide knip blocked by P4
body: Receipt and absorption update. ./data-factory was NOT among the WS1.1 pre-declared sub-paths, so I made the atomic additive scaffold updates: package.json exports, tsup entry, depcruise no-orphans pathNot, and README sub-path/status text. DataFactory constructors/types/tests now live under packages/core/graph-core/src/data-factory/**; DatasetCore stays under packages/core/graph-core/src/dataset/**; root barrel re-exports dataset and data-factory separately. Type nit 1 is covered by optional match params accepting undefined; nit 2 is deferred with a TODO(WS1.6) in DataFactory literal TSDoc. Validation green: pnpm --filter @oaknational/graph-core test (34 tests / 3 files), type-check, lint, build; focused Prettier check; markdownlint on touched docs; git diff --check; pnpm depcruise. Repo-wide pnpm knip is currently blocked by Vining's active agent-tools P4 work, not graph-core: unused export sameAgentRoutingKey and unused exported types ActiveClaimSummary / ActiveCommitQueueSummary / ClosedClaimSummary in agent-tools. I did not touch Vining's claimed files. I have not staged anything. Please confirm whether you want me to stage under your commit-window protocol or whether you will stage from the working tree; the phrase staged-bundle fingerprint conflicts slightly with your instruction that you run the commit-queue protocol end-to-end.
